emails.subject: RE: Colorado
emails.body: RE: Colorado Thanks alot. I would love to use them if at all possible. So for the late response, I was out of the office yesterday. To: Logan III, Jackson

emails.subject: RE: Colorado
emails.body: Are ya'll in the new building? If so, I will come over and check it out. Thanks Again, JDLIII To: Logan III, Jackson

emails.subject: RE: Colorado
emails.body: I remembered to bring them. Maybe we can get together later today. DG To: Giron, Darron C.

emails.subject: RE: Colorado
emails.body: Thanks... tell me whenever it is convinant for you. To: Logan III, Jackson
